## Area

- README
- contributing workflow
- architecture
- frontend docs
- analyzer docs
- public release / GitHub docs
- other

## Problem

Describe what is unclear, outdated, missing, or misleading.

## Proposed improvement

Describe what should change.

## Why it matters

Explain whether this blocks users, contributors, maintainers, or public release readiness.
